text:
(vi) The provisions of sub-section (5) and sub-section (7) to (11) of section 80-IA shall apply to
the start-ups for the purpose of allowing deductions under 80-IAC(1).
heading: Section 80-IAC provides an incentive to start-ups in order to aid their growth in the early
full_path: Startup India Tax Exemption (Section 80IAC) > Section 80 > Subsection (1) > Clause (vi)
